description: Style NoteCrafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag.Product DetailsBlack and red leather wallet, has a flap style opening with a press buttoned closureHas one main compartment Eight card holders and two transparent id card holder on the left side One slip pocket and seven card holders on the other sidenbsp; One compartment on the back with a press buttoned closure and two opened pockets and one zippered pocket Warranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care100% leatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize16 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
